rationale: The distributed patterns and AutoXRD paper specify Cu Kalpha but do not provide a calibrant-derived instrument profile; freeze Dara's bundled Rigaku MiniFlex profile without sample-wise tuning.
Dara's bundled PW1800 profile matches the 173 mm Philips geometry, Cu Kalpha, proportional point detector and diffracted-beam graphite monochromator; slit details are not exact.
The source XRDML records a 145 mm Aeris with PIXcel1D-Medipix3; this is Dara's bundled default profile.
